name: Dreaming Sarah
notes: Target title for boot-driven bring-up (small GameMaker 2D game, minimal GPU usage). PHASE-4 MILESTONE (2026-07-19, ppsa02929_wave4.log): boots the full userspace chain and dies at the GPU/AGC wall. Working chain: 20 module deps served by HLE; sceSysmoduleLoadModule bookkeeping fakes; sceSystemServiceHideSplashScreen; sceUserServiceInitialize/GetInitialUser; sceSaveDataInitialize3/DirNameSearch/Mount3 (mount '/savedata0' backed by host dir pcsx5_savedata/PPSA02929)/SaveIcon/Commit; common-dialog status flow; libc guest heap; scePadInit/scePadOpen via libkernel NIDs; sceVideoOut port + 60Hz vblank pump; equeue 'eq_vsync' created; real on-disk assets read via /app0 translation (save_data_icon.png, ~INDEX, shaders/SpriteMachine.{vert,frag}). Phase-4 filesystem view completed: Kernel::TranslateGuestPath now also maps '/savedata0/...' onto the save-data HLE host dir and resolves relative opens against the package root (guest CWD == /app0); no failing open/stat paths remain in the log. Per-title config exercised: pcsx5_config/titles/PPSA02929.json raises log level to Debug; boot log prints 'Per-title config overrides active for PPSA02929'. PHASE-5 WALL (unchanged): guest crash at RIP 0x800029516, instruction 48 8B 76 30 (mov rsi,[rsi+0x30]) reading address 0x30 with RSI=0, on the shader/content-init thread immediately after sceKernelAllocateDirectMemory(64KB)+sceKernelMapDirectMemory. Root cause: sceAgcCreateShader is a log-and-return-0 stub, so the shader handle the game dereferences is null. Per the SharpEmu study (sharpemu_clone/src/SharpEmu.Libs/Agc/AgcExports.cs:471, CreateShader) a real implementation must: ABI (out dest=rdi, shader header=rsi, code=rdx); validate header magic 0x34333231 ('1234') + version; relocate embedded pointer fields in the header (Cx/Sh register blocks, user data, specials, input/output semantics); write the code address into the header; relocate the user-data block's five pointers; patch the PGM_LO/HI program registers; and return the header pointer as the shader handle through *dest. Earlier fix history: libc _Getptolower persistent table (was crash at 0x8002b622e); libScePad libkernel NIDs; /app0 translation; AGC register defaults. Log refs: ppsa02929_wave4.log (final Phase-4 run), ppsa02929_wave3.log.
